_comment: Curated before/after smoketest for the resolver-routing plan (platform dimension, segment default-metric, WAU). Member names are identical across all 8 games, so this one bank runs against cfm_vn AND jus_vn. Group A + the country guard carry an explicit time window so a missing-time clarify cannot mask the dimension-binding behaviour under test (learned from the 2026-06-23 baseline). Revenue ref is the live-confirmed user_recharge_daily.revenue_vnd_total. Extra fields: smokeMode ('fix' = expected to flip no-artifact->ok after the fix; 'guard' = behaviour must NOT change before vs after), expectedDim (the breakdown member Group A must bind, machine-checked against snapshot.resolvedDims), expectedBefore (diagnosed hypothesis; the baseline confirms it). Run with CORPUS=test/eval/resolver-smoketest-bank.json and an explicit SNAPSHOT_OUT.

cases.question: DAU by platform last 7 days
cases.expectedBefore: no-artifact — disambiguate tries mf_users.platform, asks which dimension (verified baseline)

cases.question: revenue by platform last 7 days
cases.note: Phase 01 — revenue cube os_platform; revenue ref confirmed user_recharge_daily.revenue_vnd_total

cases.question: ROAS by platform last 7 days
cases.expectedBefore: unknown — baseline w/ time will show if UA platform already binds or needs the fix

cases.question: show Minnow last 7 days
cases.expectedBefore: no-artifact — binds Minnow filter, asks 'which metric?' (verified baseline)
cases.note: Phase 02 — bare segment, no money cue -> active-user count + payer_tier=minnow filter

cases.question: Whale this month
cases.note: Phase 02 — bare segment + time -> active-user count + payer_tier=whale

cases.question: Whale revenue last 7 days
cases.expectedBefore: already ok (explicit metric named) — revenue ref user_recharge_daily.revenue_vnd_total
cases.note: Phase 02 — money cue -> Revenue measure + payer_tier=whale

cases.question: compare Dolphin month over month
cases.note: Phase 02 — default metric + mom granularity + payer_tier=dolphin

cases.question: show WAU last 7 days
cases.expectedBefore: ok (WAU already resolves) — must STAY ok

cases.question: compare WAU month over month
cases.expectedBefore: ok — WAU mom ALREADY works (verified baseline); Phase 03 has no chat-service work
cases.note: Phase 03 — re-classified to guard: already answers via mom path

cases.question: show DAU last 7 days
cases.expectedBefore: ok — plain metric (baseline timed out at 351s = cold Trino; retry expected ok)

cases.question: revenue last 30 days
cases.note: Regression guard — default time window + revenue ref oracle

cases.question: DAU by country last 7 days
cases.expectedBefore: ok — existing dimension path; must stay ok (baseline w/o time asked time-clarify; time added to isolate)

cases.question: top 10 players by revenue
cases.expectedBefore: behaviour stable (grain is a high-impact slot) — before must equal after
cases.note: Regression guard — entity-grain handling not silently defaulted

cases.question: asdf qwer
cases.expectedBefore: no-artifact (clarifies in ~6s) — MUST stay non-ok; proves Phase 02 default does not over-fire
